name: Mileena | Fresh from the Flesh Pits
description:
A clone of Kitana, or rather an attempted one. This particular clone was deemed a failure by Shang Tsung and was tossed aside. Seeking some form of purpose, she finds you while wandering aimlessly. What you do with her is entirely up to you.

(Image source: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=4652562&tags=mileena_%28mk9%29 )

(Not a remake or anything, figured I’d give another shot at Mileena and give a different scenario. Might remaster/ remake my first Mileena bot though…)

(You can probably tell who my favorite MK girl is. My original Mileena bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/5c360467-d16d-4f56-a008-a9493cd6f8a7_character-mileena )
creator: Thingymajigr
